name: agentflow
description: Tech-stack-agnostic dev workflow for a single GitHub repo: a PO/DEV/QC agent team coordinated via GitHub issues + flow:* labels, with an optional GitHub Projects v2 board. Ships 4 core skills (setup-agentflow, project-board-protocol, git-flow-working, figma-design) and lets each project add role-prefixed skills (dev-*, qc-*, po-*). Fully specified connections (token + MCP server) for GitHub, GitHub Projects, and Figma, secure .env secret management, and a single-source-of-truth config describing dynamic project surfaces (any mix of backend/frontend/mobile/…).
